'''vozhazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labiovelar|labiovelar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-zh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labiovelar|labiovelar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vozhazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozhazithi|vozhazithi]] || [[word:vozhaziji|vozhaziji]] || [[word:vozhazishi|vozhazishi]] || [[word:vozhaziki|vozhaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozhazuthuthu|vozhazuthuthu]] || [[word:vozhazujuju|vozhazujuju]] || [[word:vozhazushushu|vozhazushushu]] || [[word:vozhazukuku|vozhazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozhazuthu|vozhazuthu]] || [[word:vozhazuju|vozhazuju]] || [[word:vozhazushu|vozhazushu]] || [[word:vozhazuku|vozhazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozhazufthuf|vozhazufthuf]] || [[word:vozhazufjuf|vozhazufjuf]] || [[word:vozhazufshuf|vozhazufshuf]] || [[word:vozhazufkuf|vozhazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozhazethe|vozhazethe]] || [[word:vozhazeje|vozhazeje]] || [[word:vozhazeshe|vozhazeshe]] || [[word:vozhazeke|vozhazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozhazothotho|vozhazothotho]] || [[word:vozhazojojo|vozhazojojo]] || [[word:vozhazoshosho|vozhazoshosho]] || [[word:vozhazokoko|vozhazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozhazotho|vozhazotho]] || [[word:vozhazojo|vozhazojo]] || [[word:vozhazosho|vozhazosho]] || [[word:vozhazoko|vozhazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozhazofthof|vozhazofthof]] || [[word:vozhazofjof|vozhazofjof]] || [[word:vozhazofshof|vozhazofshof]] || [[word:vozhazofkof|vozhazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozhazïfthïf|vozhazïfthïf]] || [[word:vozhazïfjïf|vozhazïfjïf]] || [[word:vozhazïfshïf|vozhazïfshïf]] || [[word:vozhazïfkïf|vozhazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozhazïfthïfthïf|vozhazïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:vozhazïfjïfjïf|vozhazïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:vozhazïfshïfshïf|vozhazïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:vozhazïfkïfkïf|vozhazïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozhazïfthïf|vozhazïfthïf]] || [[word:vozhazïfjïf|vozhazïfjïf]] || [[word:vozhazïfshïf|vozhazïfshïf]] || [[word:vozhazïfkïf|vozhazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozhazïfthïf|vozhazïfthïf]] || [[word:vozhazïfjïf|vozhazïfjïf]] || [[word:vozhazïfshïf|vozhazïfshïf]] || [[word:vozhazïfkïf|vozhazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vozhazæthæ|vozhazæthæ]] || [[word:vozhazæjæ|vozhazæjæ]] || [[word:vozhazæshæ|vozhazæshæ]] || [[word:vozhazækæ|vozhazækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vozhazathatha|vozhazathatha]] || [[word:vozhazajaja|vozhazajaja]] || [[word:vozhazashasha|vozhazashasha]] || [[word:vozhazakaka|vozhazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vozhazatha|vozhazatha]] || [[word:vozhazaja|vozhazaja]] || [[word:vozhazasha|vozhazasha]] || [[word:vozhazaka|vozhazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vozhazafthaf|vozhazafthaf]] || [[word:vozhazafjaf|vozhazafjaf]] || [[word:vozhazafshaf|vozhazafshaf]] || [[word:vozhazafkaf|vozhazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vozhazasha|vozhazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozhazshësha|vozhazshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozhazrosha|vozhazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozhazmusha|vozhazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozhazyasha|vozhazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozhaznkshësha|govozhaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozhaznkrosha|govozhaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozhaznkmusha|govozhaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozhaznkyasha|govozhaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vozhazhazasha|vozhazhazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozhazhazshësha|vozhazhazshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozhazhazrosha|vozhazhazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozhazhazmusha|vozhazhazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozhazhazyasha|vozhazhazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozhazhaznkshësha|govozhazhaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozhazhaznkrosha|govozhazhaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozhazhaznkmusha|govozhazhaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozhazhaznkyasha|govozhazhaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vezhæzasha|vezhæzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vezhæzshësha|vezhæzshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vezhæzrosha|vezhæzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vezhæzmusha|vezhæzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vezhæzyasha|vezhæzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govezhæznkshësha|govezhæznkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govezhæznkrosha|govezhæznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govezhæznkmusha|govezhæznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govezhæznkyasha|govezhæznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vozhfazasha|vozhfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vozhfazshësha|vozhfazshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vozhfazrosha|vozhfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vozhfazmusha|vozhfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vozhfazyasha|vozhfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govozhfaznkshësha|govozhfaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govozhfaznkrosha|govozhfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govozhfaznkmusha|govozhfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govozhfaznkyasha|govozhfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
